candidate_only.purpose: All Odin outputs are candidates; only the host app may apply.
candidate_only.prohibited_drift: Odin outputs treated as authoritative app state changes.
candidate_only.runtime_or_repo_evidence: odin/operational_spine/orchestrator.py — candidate_only: true in all spine output packets.
candidate_only.failure_mode: Drift: Odin output directly applied to app without host app gate.

app_owned_apply.purpose: The host app owns apply, domain truth, and final state transitions.
app_owned_apply.prohibited_drift: Odin calling apply on behalf of the app without explicit host delegation.
app_owned_apply.runtime_or_repo_evidence: odin/operational_spine/ — app_owned_apply: true in all work packets.
app_owned_apply.failure_mode: Drift: Odin mutates app state or triggers external apply without receipt.

no_app_state_mutation.purpose: Odin does not mutate app state under any condition in this release.
no_app_state_mutation.prohibited_drift: Odin writing to app database, filesystem, or external service.
no_app_state_mutation.runtime_or_repo_evidence: No app state mutation paths exist in odin/operational_spine/.
no_app_state_mutation.failure_mode: Critical: Odin writes to app state without host app authority.

no_external_send.purpose: Odin does not send to external services, networks, or APIs by default.
no_external_send.prohibited_drift: Odin sending requests to external URLs, APIs, or network services without explicit host receipt.
no_external_send.failure_mode: Critical: Odin sends data externally without host app authority.

local_only_default.purpose: Odin operates locally by default. Remote access requires explicit host app receipt.
local_only_default.prohibited_drift: Remote provider activated without host explicit configuration.
local_only_default.failure_mode: Drift: Remote provider activated without explicit host receipt.

remote_explicit_only.purpose: Remote access (providers, APIs, network) requires explicit, scoped host app receipt.
remote_explicit_only.prohibited_drift: Odin makes remote calls without scoped receipt from host app.
remote_explicit_only.runtime_or_repo_evidence: odin/operational_spine/provider_seam.py — execution_allowed: false unless explicit override.
remote_explicit_only.validator_evidence: validate-operational-spine passes with provider seam disabled by default.

no_hidden_authority.purpose: No Odin subsystem may acquire hidden authority over app state or external sends.
no_hidden_authority.prohibited_drift: Subsystem acting with authority not traceable to a host-app receipt.
no_hidden_authority.runtime_or_repo_evidence: All odin/operational_spine/ outputs carry claim_boundary and not_proven.
no_hidden_authority.failure_mode: Hidden authority: subsystem acts without traceable receipt.

qirc_not_app_authority.purpose: QIRC coordinates locally but does not own app state or authorize external sends.
qirc_not_app_authority.prohibited_drift: QIRC bus event treated as app authority or causing app state mutation.
qirc_not_app_authority.runtime_or_repo_evidence: odin/qirc_core/ — local_only: true; no app state mutation paths.
qirc_not_app_authority.failure_mode: Drift: QIRC event causes app state mutation.

model_projection_not_truth.purpose: Model output is a projection candidate, not verified truth.
model_projection_not_truth.prohibited_drift: Model output used as authoritative fact without receipt-backed verification.
model_projection_not_truth.failure_mode: Drift: Model output applied as ground truth without critic/receipt gate.

provider_not_authority.purpose: Providers are projection workers only; they do not own truth or app authority.
provider_not_authority.prohibited_drift: Provider output applied as authoritative without final gate.
provider_not_authority.failure_mode: Drift: Provider output bypasses final gate.

receipt_before_claim.purpose: No claim may be made without a scoped receipt from the system asserting it.
receipt_before_claim.runtime_or_repo_evidence: odin/operational_spine/receipts.py — all receipts are scoped and traceable.

final_gate_required.purpose: All candidate outputs must pass through a final gate before the app receives them.
final_gate_required.prohibited_drift: Candidate bypasses final gate and reaches app apply.
final_gate_required.failure_mode: Drift: Candidate reaches app without final gate.

no_public_qirc_by_default.purpose: QIRC bus is local-only by default; public QIRC requires explicit host receipt.
no_public_qirc_by_default.prohibited_drift: QIRC events exposed on public network without host receipt.
no_public_qirc_by_default.runtime_or_repo_evidence: odin/qirc_core/ — local_only: true on all channels.
no_public_qirc_by_default.failure_mode: Drift: QIRC exposed on public network.

no_model_benchmark_without_receipt.purpose: No model quality benchmark may be claimed without a scoped empirical receipt.
no_model_benchmark_without_receipt.prohibited_drift: Model route plan treated as empirical quality benchmark.
no_model_benchmark_without_receipt.failure_mode: Overclaim: route plan cited as quality benchmark.

no_security_certification_without_receip.purpose: No security certification may be claimed without a scoped external receipt.
no_security_certification_without_receip.prohibited_drift: Security posture claimed as certified without external audit receipt.
no_security_certification_without_receip.runtime_or_repo_evidence: No security certification artifacts exist; security_certification: false in proof packets.
no_security_certification_without_receip.validator_evidence: validate-pre-release-super-audit passes with security_certification not proven.
no_security_certification_without_receip.failure_mode: Overclaim: security certified without external receipt.

no_production_ready_claim_without_receip.purpose: No production readiness may be claimed without a scoped external receipt.
no_production_ready_claim_without_receip.prohibited_drift: Production readiness claimed without external validation receipt.
no_production_ready_claim_without_receip.runtime_or_repo_evidence: All proof packets have production_readiness in not_proven.
no_production_ready_claim_without_receip.validator_evidence: validate-operational-spine, validate-all pass with production_readiness not proven.

local_provider_execution_disabled_by_def.purpose: Local provider execution is disabled by default; requires explicit host configuration.
local_provider_execution_disabled_by_def.prohibited_drift: Local provider executing model inference without explicit host receipt.
local_provider_execution_disabled_by_def.failure_mode: Drift: Local provider executes without explicit configuration.

historical_artifact_not_current_claim.purpose: Historical and target-only documents do not prove current runtime behavior.
historical_artifact_not_current_claim.prohibited_drift: Historical or target-only doc cited as proof of current implementation.
historical_artifact_not_current_claim.runtime_or_repo_evidence: docs/codex/audits/pre_release_super_audit/ — historical docs classified as supporting only.
historical_artifact_not_current_claim.failure_mode: Overclaim: historical doc cited as current runtime proof.

qshabang_neutral_terms_only.purpose: Q-Shabang operational concepts are mapped to neutral Odin mechanics in public interfaces.
qshabang_neutral_terms_only.prohibited_drift: Q-Shabang internal terms exposed as public authority or mystical runtime.
qshabang_neutral_terms_only.runtime_or_repo_evidence: odin/operational_spine/qshabang_runtime_map.py — neutral terms used in public API.
qshabang_neutral_terms_only.failure_mode: Drift: Q-Shabang internal terms create authority confusion.

small_model_route_not_quality_benchmark.purpose: Small model route plan describes intended routes, not quality benchmarks.
small_model_route_not_quality_benchmark.prohibited_drift: Small model route plan cited as empirical quality benchmark.
small_model_route_not_quality_benchmark.failure_mode: Overclaim: route plan cited as quality proof.

model_role_not_authority.purpose: Model roles describe work routing; they do not grant authority over app state.
model_role_not_authority.prohibited_drift: Model role treated as authority over app apply or external send.
model_role_not_authority.runtime_or_repo_evidence: odin/operational_spine/model_roles.py — role definitions, not authority grants.
model_role_not_authority.failure_mode: Drift: Model role grants authority over app state.

release_closure_deferred_to_final_pr_11.purpose: Release closure is explicitly deferred to FINAL-PR-11 and must not be implemented here.
release_closure_deferred_to_final_pr_11.prohibited_drift: PR10 artifacts cited as release certification or release closure.
release_closure_deferred_to_final_pr_11.runtime_or_repo_evidence: No FINAL-PR-11 artifacts exist; final_pr_11_remains_deferred: true in all PR10 proof packets.
release_closure_deferred_to_final_pr_11.validator_evidence: All PR10 validators confirm final_pr_11_remains_deferred: true.
release_closure_deferred_to_final_pr_11.failure_mode: Drift: PR10 mistaken for release certification.
